revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]] to [[:Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2024 December 18#Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]
revision.text:
'''ATU 500-559''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Helpers'' range.
[[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text:
'''ATU 500-559''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Helpers'' range.
[[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== '''ATU 500-559''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[:en:Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index|Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Helpers'' range.
==Categories==
[[en:Category:ATU 500-559]] {{wikidata link|Q111975925}} [[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]
